<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Drivers\Gd\Modifiers; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\SizeInterface; class ResizeDownModifier extends ResizeModifier { protected function getAdjustedSize(ImageInterface $image): SizeInterface { return $image->size()->resizeDown($this->width, $this->height); } }
